metadata.description: StackOne agent plugins — integration infrastructure for AI agents with 200+ connectors, MCP, A2A, SDKs, and prompt injection defense. One plugin per skill.

plugins.name: stackone-platform
plugins.description: Platform operations — API keys, accounts, logs, debugging, webhook configuration.

plugins.name: stackone-connect
plugins.description: Account linking with Connect Sessions and the Hub React component.

plugins.name: stackone-agents
plugins.description: Build AI agents that call StackOne-linked accounts via TypeScript/Python SDK, MCP, or A2A.

plugins.name: stackone-connectors
plugins.description: Discover StackOne's 200+ connectors and 9,000+ actions across HRIS, ATS, CRM, LMS, and more.

plugins.name: stackone-cli
plugins.description: Build and deploy custom StackOne connectors using the CLI and Connector Engine.

plugins.name: stackone-unified-connectors
plugins.description: Build unified/schema-based connectors that transform provider data into standardized schemas.

plugins.name: stackone-defender
plugins.description: Prompt-injection and jailbreak detection for tool results via on-device ML classifier.
